parts: Name these creatures, fifty of whom are instructed to guard the protagonist’s petticoat while one named Ariel guards the protagonist’s spaniel Shock.
The sylph Ariel awakens the sleeping Belinda to warn her of the approach of the scissor-wielding Baron in this mock-epic by Alexander Pope.
